feature_1.alt: Feature 1 image: macro low-angle of molten soy wax pouring into a reclaimed glass vessel, highlighting texture, sheen, and wick placement. Matches tactile hand-pour craft and warm tungsten palette.

feature_2.alt: Feature 2 image ('Orchard Dusk'): finished candle on folded linen with a soft-focus sliced apple and brass spoon. Emphasizes textile texture and warm terracotta accents to match scent copy.
